web.title: GitHub - callstack/agent-device: CLI to control iOS and Android devices ...
web.description: A device automation CLI for real apps on iOS, Android, TV, web, and desktop. Agents get token-efficient snapshots, semantic refs, and evidence captured only when needed. agent-device lets coding agents open apps, inspect the current UI, interact with visible elements, and collect debugging evidence through one CLI.

web.title: GitHub - ghost-in-the-droid/android-agent: Open-source Android device ...
web.description: Open-source Python framework for controlling real Android phones via ADB. No app installed. No footprint. Pure automation. Define skills for any app, run them from the dashboard or API, scale across a phone farm. The ghost taps what you'd tap 50+ ADB methods — tap, swipe, type, clipboard, stealth variants Live phone screen streaming (MJPEG and WebRTC) Interactive touch-to-tap on the streamed ...

web.title: Controlling Android Devices with AI and Natural Language
web.description: How the DroidRun framework turns plain English into taps, swipes, and automations 1. The Challenge of Mobile Automation Today Typing scripts, rooting phones, or learning ADB commands has be...

web.title: I built an opensource Android AI automation agent
web.description: Introducing heybro: The Open-Source Android AI Agent for On-Device Automation In the ever-evolving landscape of mobile technology, the desire for seamless and intelligent automation has never been greater. Imagine an AI agent on your Android device that can understand your needs and automate tasks without being tethered to a computer.

web.title: DroidRun: The Open-Source Mobile Automation Framework That's ...
web.description: DroidRun is an open-source Python framework that bridges the gap between LLM reasoning and mobile device control. By combining screenshot analysis, ADB (Android Debug Bridge) communication, and advanced agent reasoning, it creates intelligent "digital assistants" that can execute complex, multi-step tasks on Android devices.

web.title: Breaking Android with AI: A Deep Dive into LLM-Powered Exploitation
web.description: This study explores Android penetration testing automation using LLM-based tools, especially PentestGPT, to identify and execute rooting techniques. Through a comparison of the traditional manual rooting process and exploitation methods produced using AI, this study evaluates the efficacy, reliability, and scalability of automated penetration ...

web.title: DroidRun Agent: AI-Powered Android Device Control & Automation
web.description: DroidRun Agent is a Python client enabling AI agents to programmatically control Android devices without root or ADB. Features HTTP/WebSocket clients, MCP Server integration for AI tools, secure auth, and automatic reconnections.

web.title: ClawFarm — Android Device Automation
web.description: ClawFarm is AI-powered automation software for Android devices. You connect your physical phones or emulators, describe a task in plain English, and ClawFarm's AI agents navigate the UI and execute it.
